mundo.titulo: Sentences of boys spared custody over rape referred to Court of Appeal
mundo.resumen: The sentences of boys spared custody over the rape of two girls in Hampshire will be referred to the Court of Appeal, the prime minister has said.

mundo.titulo: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
mundo.resumen: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

mundo.titulo: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
mundo.resumen: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

mundo.titulo: Three teens dead after being in water at beauty spots
mundo.resumen: Three teenagers were found in water in separate incidents across England on Bank Holiday Monday.

mundo.titulo: Sturgeon showed 'remarkable lack of curiosity' over SNP finances, says former MP
mundo.resumen: The former SNP MP has called for an independent inquiry into how Peter Murrell was able to embezzle more than £400,000.

mundo.titulo: Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
mundo.resumen: Israel says it struck 100 Hezbollah infrastructure sites and fighters in Lebanon, after PM Benjamin Netanyahu vows to "crush" Hezbollah.

negocios.titulo: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
negocios.resumen: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

negocios.titulo: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
negocios.resumen: Lord Wolfson tells the BBC Next now typically receives double the number of applicants for one role than it did two years ago.

negocios.titulo: Streeting backs under-16s social media ban as government consultation concludes

negocios.resumen: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

negocios.titulo: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
negocios.resumen: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.

tecnologia.titulo: 7-Eleven data breach affects over 185,000 people’s personal data
tecnologia.resumen: The data breach included names, dates-of-birth, postal addresses, and Social Security numbers, according to a state government listing.

tecnologia.titulo: Amazon fulfillment competitor Stord raises $250M at $3B valuation
tecnologia.resumen: Stord was founded in 2015 by then-college students CEO Sean Henry  and CTO Jacob Boudreau while they were still at Georgia Tech.

tecnologia.titulo: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
tecnologia.resumen: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents.

tecnologia.titulo: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
tecnologia.resumen: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

tecnologia.titulo: The pitch trick that helped an eSports startup raise $20M when VCs only wanted AI
tecnologia.resumen: Earlier this year, Lucra Sports founder and CEO Dylan Robbins did something that no one else has ever done. And he shared several secrets on how he did it.

tecnologia.titulo: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
tecnologia.resumen: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.

tecnologia.titulo: Spotify is narrating magazine articles now
tecnologia.resumen: Would you listen to magazine articles on Spotify? The streaming platform certainly hopes so, as it's launching a new format for narrated long-form articles, alongside its usual array of music, podcasts, and audiobooks. tecnologia.titulo: A battery-powered Starlink Mini is likely on the way
tecnologia.resumen: Code in recent Starlink firmware suggests that SpaceX might soon release a version of its smallest internet dish with an integrated battery.
